doc_title_en: Notice of Mid-Term Management Plan Formulation and Revision of Measures to Realize Management with Awareness of Capital Costs and Stock Price

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現

summary_en: ROE 8.0%+ by FY3/31 as final goal; FY3/27–FY3/29 mid-term plan designated as critical execution phase. Current ROE ~6% on operating earnings basis (excluding one-time gains). Three pillars: next-generation wholesale evolution, portfolio redesign, management foundation strengthening.
summary_jp: FY3/31までにROE 8.0%以上達成を最終目標。FY3/27～FY3/29の3年間を重要な実行フェーズと位置付け。現在ROE約6%（一時的利益除く）。次世代卸への進化、事業ポートフォリオ再設計、経営基盤強化の3本柱。
tag_en: COC Update - ROE 8.0%+ by FY3/31 - 3-year planning window (FY3/27–FY3/29)
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識 更新 - ROE 8.0%以上 FY3/31までに - 3年中期経営計画
